title: I need help connecting columns with boards-contact-organisation-event
excerpt: We have started with CRM template. We have boards contacts, organisations then  boards for different services. if i create a student in a course board i would like that to connect to contact and organisation. cant work o…

posts.author: mmandeno (Mark Mandeno)
posts.cookedHtml: We have started with CRM template. We have boards contacts, organisations then boards for different services. if i create a student in a course board i would like that to connect to contact and organisation. cant work out how

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mmandeno,

I think our match automations might work best for you here, especially if you have values in your course board (i.e student/contact name) that match with the values in your secondary board.

For example:

Screen Shot 2022-11-21 at 12.16.22 pm676×542 31.6 KB

Let me know if this is along the lines of what you’re looking for!

posts.author: mmandeno (Mark Mandeno)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. Just have a look at the automations and I can’t find this one. Where is it?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @mmandeno - monday march automation works when item is created. If you are looking to create a repository board that auto connect items and sub-items between multiple board your should try VLOOKUP marketplace app.
